title: libertia ixioides
intro: Libertia ixioides, also known as the New Zealand iris, is a type of flowering plant native to New Zealand. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Libertia ixioides include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Libertia ixioides can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea or by using its root in tincture form.
